languages.text: Судно без опознавательных знаков медленно дрейфует мимо флагмана. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Люмены{/g} его погашены, а корпус изуродован черной сыпью оплавленных рытвин от залпов неизвестного оружия. Рой космического мусора кружит вокруг корабля, словно насекомые над гниющим трупом. Тем тревожнее звучит отчет {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуров{/g} — в чреве выпотрошенного судна теплится жизнь.

traits.locale_text: Судно без опознавательных знаков медленно дрейфует мимо флагмана. {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Люмены{/g} его погашены, а корпус изуродован черной сыпью оплавленных рытвин от залпов неизвестного оружия. Рой космического мусора кружит вокруг корабля, словно насекомые над гниющим трупом. Тем тревожнее звучит отчет {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}авгуров{/g} — в чреве выпотрошенного судна теплится жизнь.

languages.text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. A swarm of space debris circles the ship like insects over a decaying corpse. But more alarming is the feedback from your {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} — there is something alive in the bowels of the ravaged ship.

A swarm of space debris circles the ship like insects over a decaying corpse. But more alarming is the feedback from your {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} — there is something alive in the bowels of the ravaged ship.

languages.text: 一艘没有任何标识的船只缓缓漂过旗舰，其{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}已然熄灭，船体上布满未知武器齐射留下的熔蚀沟壑。一大片太空垃圾像腐尸上的虫群一样绕着它打转。可更令人不安的是，你的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}传回了反馈——这艘残破船只的深处，有活物存在。
languages.original_text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. A swarm of space debris circles the ship like insects over a decaying corpse. But more alarming is the feedback from your {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} — there is something alive in the bowels of the ravaged ship.

traits.locale_text: 一艘没有任何标识的船只缓缓漂过旗舰，其{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}流明灯{/g}已然熄灭，船体上布满未知武器齐射留下的熔蚀沟壑。一大片太空垃圾像腐尸上的虫群一样绕着它打转。可更令人不安的是，你的{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}俄歇矩阵{/g}传回了反馈——这艘残破船只的深处，有活物存在。

languages.text: Una nave sin marcas pasa a la deriva junto a la nave insignia, con los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apagados y el casco plagado de surcos derretidos por efecto de una artillería desconocida. Un enjambre de desechos rodea a la nave como insectos en torno a un cadáver en descomposición. Más alarmante es la información de los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}: hay algo vivo en las entrañas de la nave destrozada.
languages.original_text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. A swarm of space debris circles the ship like insects over a decaying corpse. But more alarming is the feedback from your {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augurs{/g} — there is something alive in the bowels of the ravaged ship.

traits.locale_text: Una nave sin marcas pasa a la deriva junto a la nave insignia, con los {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} apagados y el casco plagado de surcos derretidos por efecto de una artillería desconocida. Un enjambre de desechos rodea a la nave como insectos en torno a un cadáver en descomposición. Más alarmante es la información de los {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g}: hay algo vivo en las entrañas de la nave destrozada.

languages.text: Un vaisseau non-identifié passe devant le vaisseau amiral, à la dérive. Ses {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} sont éteints, et sa coque est criblée de balafres laissées par des tirs d'artillerie inconnue. D'innombrables débris tournent autour du vaisseau comme autant de mouches attirées par un cadavre en putréfaction. Plus alarmant encore, vos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté des signes de vie dans les entrailles du vaisseau ravagé.
languages.original_text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. D'innombrables débris tournent autour du vaisseau comme autant de mouches attirées par un cadavre en putréfaction. Plus alarmant encore, vos {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}augures{/g} ont détecté des signes de vie dans les entrailles du vaisseau ravagé.

languages.text: İşaretsiz bir gemi; {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lümenleri{/g} sönmüş, gövdesi bilinmeyen silahların salvolarından kalma erimiş izlerle delik deşik olmuş hâlde sancak gemisinin yanından yavaşça süzülerek geçiyor. Bir uzay enkazı yığını, çürüyen bir cesedin üzerindeki böcekler gibi geminin etrafında dönüyor. Ancak daha endişe verici olanı, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametlerinden{/g} gelen bildirim... Harap olmuş geminin içinde canlı bir şeyler var.
languages.original_text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. Bir uzay enkazı yığını, çürüyen bir cesedin üzerindeki böcekler gibi geminin etrafında dönüyor. Ancak daha endişe verici olanı, {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}alametlerinden{/g} gelen bildirim... Harap olmuş geminin içinde canlı bir şeyler var.

languages.text: Ein nicht gekennzeichnetes Schiff treibt mit erloschenen {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}Lumen{/g} langsam am Flaggschiff vorbei. Sein Rumpf wurde von mehreren Salven einer unbekannten Waffe getroffen. Zahllose Trümmer kreisen um das Schiff wie Insekten um einen Kadaver. Weit alarmierender ist allerdings die Analyse deiner {g|Encyclopedia:Augur}Auguren{/g} — in den Eingeweiden des zerstörten Schiffes lebt etwas.
languages.original_text: An unmarked vessel drifts slowly past the flagship, its {g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}lumens{/g} extinguished, and its hull pockmarked with melted ruts from the salvos of unknown weaponry. languages.text: 旗艦の横をゆっくりと漂う無標識の船。その{g|Encyclopedia:Lumen}ルメン{/g}は消え、砲撃による溶けた跡が船体一面に刻まれている。宇宙のゴミが腐敗した死体の上を舞うように、旗艦の周りを漂う。しかし、より恐ろしいのはあなたの{g|Encyclopedia:Augur}アウグール{/g}の反応だ。破壊された船の腹に何かが生きている。
